name: Strawberry Ice Box Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the Jello in hot water and stir until the mixture is smooth.
2. Add sugar to the Jello solution and stir until dissolved.
3. In a separate bowl, dissolve marshmallows in the Jello mixture using a fork or spoon.
4. Allow the mixture to cool slightly before stirring in whipped cream, frozen strawberries, and chopped nuts.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Line an 8X12-inch pan with vanilla wafers crumbs.
7. Layer half of the Jello mixture over the bottom layer of wafer crumbs.
8. Add a layer of wafer crumbs on top of the Jello.
9. Pour remaining Jello mixture over the wafer crumbs, then add more wafer crumbs on top.
10. Bake for 30-40 minutes or until set and lightly browned.
11. Let cool completely before refrigerating overnight.
12. Serve chilled with whipped cream if desired.
